quick_reference.use: Secondary text — comfortably passes AA + AAA
Tertiary — barely passes AA, use carefully
Accent text on white — passes AA
White on accent button — passes AA

rules: ALWAYS check contrast when using accent color as text on white
NEVER use semantic colors (danger red, success green) as background without checking contrast
Color is NEVER the only signal — always pair with icon, label, or border pattern
Test with real content at real sizes — small text at 4.51:1 is technically passing but practically uncomfortable
8% of males are colorblind — never rely on red vs green alone to communicate state
dark_mode_notes: Recheck all contrast ratios in dark mode — token values change and some combinations that pass in light mode fail in dark
Pure black (#000000) background causes excessive contrast and halation on OLED — use #09090B or #0F172A
Reduce shadow opacity by ~50% in dark mode — dark surfaces naturally recede without heavy shadows
